metadata.description: design-expert: a paragraph-first, evidence-grounded skill for interface design. Build, review, plan, and write UI with the discipline of NNg heuristics, Universal Design, anti-AI-slop patterns, and a curated pantheon of historical designers.

plugins.name: design-expert
plugins.description: Design-expert: build, review, plan, and write interfaces with craft and evidence. Merges NNg heuristics, Universal Design, anti-AI-slop patterns, and a manifesto-voiced craft framework. Use for design reviews, UX critiques, accessibility audits, dashboard or admin builds, and any brand or product surface.
